title: Monster Food
description: Adds new foods using hostile mobs as ingredients
body:
Adds the following foods:

- Bone Marrow
- Cooked Bone Marrow
- Seasoned Zombie
- Zombie Roast
- Seasoned Pigman
- Roasted Pigman
- Zombie Jerky
- Spider Paste
- Ender Dumpling
- Silverfish
- Endermite
 

Also, additional crafting items of:

- Grinding Rock
- Bone Salts
